description: Deductible amount.
typical_root_cause: Member has not met the annual deductible
typical_fix: Transfer balance to patient responsibility; no resubmission

description: Coinsurance amount.
typical_root_cause: Member cost-share applied per plan
typical_fix: Transfer balance to patient responsibility; no resubmission

description: Co-payment amount.
typical_root_cause: Member copay applied per plan
typical_fix: Transfer balance to patient responsibility; no resubmission

description: The procedure code is inconsistent with the modifier used, or a required modifier is missing.
typical_root_cause: Required modifier (laterality/therapy discipline/anatomic) omitted at charge entry
typical_fix: Append the correct modifier and resubmit as a corrected claim

description: The procedure code/type of bill is inconsistent with the place of service.
typical_root_cause: Wrong POS code for where the service was rendered
typical_fix: Correct the place of service and resubmit

description: The procedure/revenue code is inconsistent with the patient's age.
typical_root_cause: Age-specific code billed for a patient outside its range
typical_fix: Recode to the age-appropriate CPT and resubmit

description: The diagnosis is inconsistent with the procedure.
typical_root_cause: Line points at a diagnosis that does not support the procedure
typical_fix: Repoint the line to the supporting ICD-10 already documented

description: Claim/service lacks information or has submission/billing error(s).
typical_root_cause: Missing or invalid data element (member ID, dx pointer, NDC, attachment)
typical_fix: Read the RARC to find the missing element; supply it and resubmit. Beware: payers sometimes use 16 for edits that are really bundling or modifier problems

description: Exact duplicate claim/service.
typical_root_cause: Claim was already received or paid
typical_fix: Verify original payment; close the duplicate rather than resubmitting

description: This care may be covered by another payer per coordination of benefits.
typical_root_cause: Another payer is primary for this member
typical_fix: Determine primacy; bill the primary first and resubmit with its EOB

description: The impact of prior payer(s) adjudication including payments and/or adjustments.
typical_root_cause: Secondary claim adjusted by primary payment
typical_fix: Verify COB math; usually no action required

description: Expenses incurred prior to coverage.
typical_root_cause: Service predates the member's effective date
typical_fix: Verify eligibility dates; bill patient if confirmed

description: Expenses incurred after coverage terminated.
typical_root_cause: Coverage termed before the date of service
typical_fix: Verify term date with eligibility; bill patient or find active coverage

description: The time limit for filing has expired.
typical_root_cause: Claim submitted past the payer's filing deadline
typical_fix: Appeal only with proof of timely submission; otherwise write off

description: Patient cannot be identified as our insured.
typical_root_cause: Subscriber ID or demographics do not match payer enrollment
typical_fix: Correct member ID/demographics from the eligibility response and resubmit

description: Services denied at the time authorization/pre-certification was requested.
typical_root_cause: Authorization was requested and refused
typical_fix: Appeal with clinical documentation; do not resubmit unchanged

description: Charge exceeds fee schedule/maximum allowable or contracted/legislated fee arrangement.
typical_root_cause: Billed amount above the contracted allowable
typical_fix: Write off the contractual difference; no resubmission

description: These are non-covered services because this is not deemed a medical necessity by the payer.
typical_root_cause: Payer's clinical policy/LCD criteria not met on the claim as coded
typical_fix: Appeal with clinical documentation mapped to the policy criteria

description: Non-covered charge(s).
typical_root_cause: Service excluded under the member's benefit plan
typical_fix: Check plan documents; bill patient with ABN or write off

description: The benefit for this service is included in the payment/allowance for another service/procedure that has already been adjudicated.
typical_root_cause: Service bundled into a same-day comprehensive procedure (NCCI PTP edit)
typical_fix: Check the NCCI table; if a modifier is allowed and documentation supports distinct service append it (25 on E/M; 59/X{EPSU} on procedures)

description: Claim/service not covered by this payer/contractor. You must send the claim/service to the correct payer/contractor.
typical_root_cause: Wrong payer billed for this member or plan type
typical_fix: Identify the correct payer and redirect the claim

description: Billing date predates service date.
typical_root_cause: Data entry error in dates
typical_fix: Correct the dates and resubmit

description: Benefit maximum for this time period or occurrence has been reached.
typical_root_cause: Visit or dollar maximum exhausted
typical_fix: Verify accumulator; bill patient for services beyond the max

description: Payment adjusted because the payer deems the information submitted does not support this many/frequency of services.
typical_root_cause: Units or frequency exceed policy limits
typical_fix: Appeal with documentation supporting frequency or correct the units

description: This (these) diagnosis(es) is (are) not covered.
typical_root_cause: Diagnosis excluded from coverage under the plan
typical_fix: Confirm coding is correct; if so bill patient or write off

description: Procedure code was invalid on the date of service.
typical_root_cause: Deleted or not-yet-effective CPT billed
typical_fix: Recode to the CPT valid on the DOS and resubmit

description: Procedure modifier was invalid on the date of service.
typical_root_cause: Modifier deleted or inapplicable on the DOS
typical_fix: Replace with the valid modifier and resubmit

description: Precertification/authorization/notification absent.
typical_root_cause: Required prior authorization missing from the claim
typical_fix: If auth exists key it onto the claim and resubmit; else pursue retro-auth per payer policy

description: Precertification/authorization exceeded.
typical_root_cause: Services exceed the number/scope authorized
typical_fix: Request an updated auth or appeal with documentation

description: This service/equipment/drug is not covered under the patient's current benefit plan.
typical_root_cause: Benefit excluded under the current plan
typical_fix: Verify benefits; bill patient or write off

description: Information requested from the billing/rendering provider was not provided or was insufficient/incomplete.
typical_root_cause: Records request not answered timely
typical_fix: Submit the requested documentation and resubmit

description: This procedure or procedure/modifier combination is not compatible with another procedure or procedure/modifier combination provided on the same day according to the National Correct Coding Initiative or workers compensation state regulations/fee schedule requirements.
typical_root_cause: NCCI procedure-to-procedure edit hit
typical_fix: Check the NCCI modifier indicator; append 59/X modifier only with documented distinct service; otherwise write off the component

description: Claim/Service denied.
typical_root_cause: Generic denial with no specific reason given
typical_fix: Call the payer or check the portal to identify the true reason before acting

description: This provider was not certified/eligible to be paid for this procedure/service on this date of service.
typical_root_cause: Provider credentialing/enrollment gap on the DOS
typical_fix: Route to credentialing; appeal once enrollment is corrected
